productDisplayName: Puma Men 917 Lo Paint Splatter White Casual Shoes
description: There are three things you can expect from a shoe inspired by the Porsche 917 car that Steve McQueen drove in the classic 1971 movie Le Mans. These are: speed grace and style. That's what this 917 series of footwear from puma offers.UpperFabric upper with durable PU toe box and formstripe for absolute comfort and durabilityPU foxing for durabilityMidsoleLightweight EVA midsole for comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with ergonomic grooves for absolute grip and traction
